summary: Extended the running-app smoke runner with locale launch arguments and built-app localization resource checks, then proved en, es, fr, ar, and zh-Hans launch stability on simulator with temporary screenshot artifacts.
validations_passed: xcodebuild build -quiet -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-locale-smoke-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO

contract_status_changes.before: Localization had build-tested packaging proof, but no running-app proof that representative locales launch and load packaged resources at runtime.
contract_status_changes.after: The smoke runner can launch Owlory with Apple locale arguments and record requested locale metadata in the JSON result.

contract_status_changes.before: Localization parity and build packaging were checked statically, but the running-app smoke runner did not verify locale resources inside the built .app before launch.
contract_status_changes.after: When --locale is provided, the runner requires <locale>.lproj/Localizable.strings in the built app and also requires Localizable.stringsdict when English plural resources are packaged.

contract_status_changes.before: The localization lane had no repeatable runtime proof path for English, Latin placeholder locales, RTL launch pressure, or CJK resource loading.
contract_status_changes.after: en, es, fr, ar, and zh-Hans each built, installed, launched, and produced a temporary simulator screenshot.

residual_risks: Locale smoke proves resource loading and launch stability only; it does not prove translation quality or layout correctness.
Screenshots were captured as temporary /tmp artifacts and were not preserved as repo-managed proof, so this slice does not claim screenshot-verified proof.
No flow verification, device proof, delivered-notification device proof, TestFlight proof, or native-speaker translation review was performed.
Smoke JSON files report repo.dirty=yes because they were captured after the automation/doc slice files were edited and before this handoff commit; final repo cleanliness is checked after commit.
The unsigned simulator build passed with the pre-existing TodayView onChange deprecation warning and build-info run script notes unrelated to this slice.
recommended_next_reason: If reviewable locale evidence is needed, preserve the representative locale screenshots and manifest in the repo as a separate screenshot-proof slice without broadening translation or layout claims.
